subcodes.first_line: O servant of the gathering! Thy letter was received. It appeareth that there is tumult and commotion in Shiraz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم محفل ملاقات نامه شما رسید چنان معلوم میشود که در شیراز فوج و موج است
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @past, present and future of Iran, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
